title: Pixels on My Phone
lyrics: [Music] (Music) these pixels on my screen instead of your skin maybe i don't think it can be a better way even if To get me through, get me throw If tomorrow never comes in time I still got these pixels of you words on my screen, all the pictures, photographs are nasty things you say to me show me the picture of your blowjob baby show me a picture of your map from parts Show me a part of you so I can keep it in my pocket Oh, that's still us, in between the sheets of our lives and our dreams baby But you're still far away, live tomorrow I wish you'd find a way to get to me through all the disasters of our life I know we can be better than ever [Music] I know we can't feel each other but I'd be here I can't take the things you said I can wait to get you on my phone If tomorrow never comes, well I will guess I'll be alone And tomorrow it will come I still got these pixels baby in the end In the end I'll these pixels even if you say goodbye to me me baby Maybe that's all I'll ever get

lyricsSegments.text: [Music] (Music) these pixels on my screen instead of your skin maybe i don't think it can be a better way even if To get me through, get me throw If tomorrow never comes in time
I still got these pixels of you words on my screen, all the pictures, photographs are nasty things you say to me
show me the picture of your blowjob baby
show me a picture of your map from parts
Show me a part of you so I can keep it in my pocket
Oh, that's still us, in between the sheets of our lives and our dreams baby
But you're still far away, live tomorrow I wish you'd find a way to get to me through all the disasters of our life
I know we can be better than ever [Music] I know we can't feel each other but I'd be here
I can't take the things you said
I can wait to get you on my phone
If tomorrow never comes, well I will guess I'll be alone
And tomorrow it will come I still got these pixels baby in the end
In the end I'll these pixels even if you say goodbye to me me
baby Maybe that's all I'll ever get
